# Angie

> Angie is an AI income strategist that turns your skills into income through personalized plans, daily missions, outreach scripts, and execution strategies.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Angie's AI-powered income execution platform.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Pro, and Accelerator plans with Paystack billing.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Refund](/refund): Refund policy.
